title: Vitebsk Heavy Rain
lead: Vitebsk is experiencing a severe rain event with a Z-Score of -3.00. This anomaly has a critical score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Vitebsk is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 89% and moderate wind speed of 10.8 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 11.5 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG suggest a substantial impact on heating and energy demand.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain in Vitebsk.
